modules.module_title: Introduction to Paper Craft, Origami Basics & Paper Types
Tools & Materials (Cutters, Bone Folders, Glue types, Ribbons)
Essential Folds, Quilling, Paper Sculpting & Creasing
Gift Wrapping Techniques (Box wrap, Bow making, Pleating styles)
Creative Paper Products (Greeting Cards, Envelopes, Gift Boxes)
Finishing, Packaging, Quality Check, Pricing & Craft Selling

questions.question: Paper Craft (kagaz kala) me paper thickness/density ko kis unit me measure kiya jata hai?

options.A: GSM (Grams per Square Meter - kagaz ka wazan prati varg meter)

questions.explanation: GSM paper ki thickness aur weight density to represent karta hai. Low GSM (eg 70 GSM) thin copier paper hota hai, high GSM (eg 300 GSM) thick cardstock hota hai.

questions.question: Origami (Japanese paper folding art) me standard rule kya follow kiya jata hai?

options.A: Square paper sheet ka use karna bina scissors cuts (kaatne) ya glue (chipkane) ke
options.B: Multiple round sheets ko glue se chipkana

questions.explanation: Pure Origami me single square sheet ko complex geometrical folding techniques se folds karke animals ya shapes banate hain, cutting aur gluing strictly prohibited hota hai.

questions.question: Paper Crafting me sharp clean creases (saaf aur thos mod lines) crease marks lagane ke liye kis tool ka use kiya jata hai?

options.A: Bone Folder (haddi ya plastic ka chapat tool)

questions.explanation: Bone folder paper surface ko smooth rub karke bina fiber damage kiye clean fold folds mark locks coordinate karta hai.

questions.question: Quilling (kagaz ki baarik strips ko roll karke designs banana) art me paper rolls coil coils shape adjust karne ke liye kis specialized needle ka use hota hai?

options.A: Slotted Quilling Tool (kinare par slit kanta cut needle)

questions.explanation: Slotted needle tool ke center slit gap me paper strip insert karke easily tight circular scroll spiral rolls banaye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Origami folds grammar me upar ki taraf points create karne wale fold line ko kya bolte hain?

options.A: Mountain Fold (pahar mod - fold pointing upwards like peak)
options.B: Valley Fold (ghati mod - fold pointing downwards)

questions.explanation: Mountain fold inverted V shaped ridge banata hai, jabki Valley fold hollow canal structure banata hai.

questions.question: Gift Wrapping (upahar lapetna) me wrapping paper boundaries cut check lines me standard rule kya hai?

options.A: Paper size box dimensions ko fully cover kare plus 2-3 inches extra overlay wrap borders fold margins ke liye
options.B: Paper size box se half hona chahiye hamesha

questions.explanation: Exact wrapping layout sizing paper borders overlap gaps restrict coordinates, neat gift display structures locks check.

questions.question: Professional gift wrapping setups me invisible adhesive look dene ke liye kaun sa tape use kiya jata hai?

options.A: Double-Sided Tape / Double-stick tape (dono taraf chipkane wala tape)
options.D: Paper gum liquid directly on edges

questions.explanation: Double sided tape flaps ke under hide ho jata hai, jisse gift wrapping exterior seams paper clear visual clean interfaces show hotay hain.

questions.question: Paper flower making me petals texture structures highlights (ghumaav/waves) curl templates kis step tool se create kiye jate hain?

options.A: Running edge of scissors blade along petal (scissors blade sweep tension)
options.B: Soaking paper in hot water loops

questions.explanation: Scissors blade and thumb compression drag paper structure bend curl direction control details checks.

questions.question: Gift box corners me 'Mitred Corners / 45-degree folds' why preferred in premium box wraps?

options.A: Creates highly professional, clean flat triangular folds without bulky paper stacking wrinkles

questions.explanation: Mitred folding technique angles overlapping flaps cleanly, producing crisp geometric outlines on rectangular gift box corners.

questions.question: Paper quilling shapes checks 'Tight Coil' vs 'Loose Coil' adjustments what tool evaluates diameter sizes in production?

options.A: Quilling Circle Sizer Template (plastic board holes templates to expand coils to precise diameters)

questions.explanation: Sizer templates allow released quilled coils to unwind to exact circular matching sizes, essential for symmetrical earring/mandala pairs.

questions.question: Greeting card designs structures card base cardstock GSM parameters typical selection ranges?

options.A: 220 to 300 GSM (heavy sturdy weight card stock to prevent card bending sagging when standing)

questions.explanation: Sturdy cardstock bases hold heavy 3D elements, pop ups, and decorative layers without collapsing structurally.

questions.question: Paper cutting tools safety checks 'Precision craft knife / X-Acto knife' blade handling protocols what is standard rule?

options.A: Always cut away from body directions, keep fingers behind cutting path and store blade with protective cap
options.B: Cut towards thumb directly for high force
options.C: Leave active blades exposed on workspaces

questions.explanation: Sharp utility blades slip paths cause severe fingers injuries. Safe positioning of support hands is critical.

questions.question: Gift bows styling 'Ribbon curls' adjustments did ribbon types make difference in curl retention?

options.A: Yes, ribbon material must have wire edges (wired ribbon loops) or crimped plastic textures to hold shape curves
options.B: No, all soft silk ribbons curl identically
options.C: Ribbons must be wet to curl

questions.explanation: Wired ribbons maintain shape locks, allowing operators to build big, fluffy gift bows that do not sag during transit.

questions.question: Paper pop-up greeting cards mechanisms 'V-fold / Parallel folds' how it is activated?

options.A: Internal pop-up elements are glued on fold crease lines, pushing details forward automatically when card opens 90 degrees

questions.explanation: V-folds translate rotational card opening motion into linear expansion push, creating 3D pop ups displays.

questions.question: Paper Craft startup packaging configurations box selection why rigid cardboard presentation boxes are preferred for paper flower bouquets?

options.A: Prevents delicate paper petals from crushing deformations under external weight boxes loads during shipping

questions.explanation: Stiff enclosure structures protect fragile handcraft paper loops from humidity shifts and pressure crush errors.

questions.question: Paper Crafting glues selections 'PVA Glue' (polyvinyl acetate - white craft glue) why preferred over hot melt glue guns for clean paper joints?

options.A: PVA glue dries slower (allows adjustment) and does not add bulky thick ridges like hot glue does
options.B: PVA glue dries instantly in 1 microsecond
options.C: PVA glue dissolves paper fibers completely

questions.explanation: PVA white glue dries thin, flat, and transparent with high flexibility, maintaining card profile geometries.

questions.question: Origami fold bases 'Bird Base' (chidiya aadhar fold) what basic folded structure it initiates?

options.A: Square base combined with two petal folds (initiates classic origami crane/bird model)

questions.explanation: Bird base is classic origami folding template, unlocking four flaps to construct wings, tail and neck.

questions.question: Quilling shapes configurations 'Teardrop shape' how it is formed from loose round coil?

options.A: Squeeze loose circular coil at one end between thumb and index finger to create sharp point tip
options.B: Squeeze coil at both opposite ends

questions.explanation: Squeezing one corner point creates drop/teardrop contours, widely used for flower petals and leaf patterns.

questions.question: Paper sculpting tools 'Embossing Stylus / Ball tools' why utilized in paper flower modeling?

options.A: Rubbing ball tip on paper petal surface cup stretches paper fibers, forming concave cup shapes

questions.explanation: Steel ball tips stretch fibers locally on soft foam pads, modeling natural 3D curved shapes on flat paper cutouts.

questions.question: Gift packaging configurations 'Basket wrap cellophane sheet' how wrapping is gathered at top?

options.A: Gather cellophane sheet margins above basket center, secure tight with wire tie, cover with satin bow ribbon
options.B: Glue cellophane flat to box sides
options.C: Melt cellophane with hot iron directly

questions.explanation: Top gathering cellophane sheets creates beautiful transparent display structures, typical of premium gift baskets.

questions.question: Paper Crafting glues PVA?

options.A: PVA glue dries slower (allows adjustment) and does not add bulky thick ridges like hot glue does
options.B: PVA glue dries instantly in 1 microsecond
options.C: PVA glue dissolves paper fibers completely

questions.explanation: PVA white glue dries thin, flat, and transparent with high flexibility, maintaining card profile geometries.

questions.question: Paper cutting alignments 'Self-Healing Cutting Mat' why critical accessory for craft knives?

options.A: Porous plastic grid surfaces seal cutting slit lines automatically, preventing blade dulling and protecting workspaces

questions.explanation: Self-healing mats contain soft elastic PVC layers that open and close behind cuts, keeping cutting surfaces smooth.

questions.question: Paper flowers decorations 'Crepe Paper stretching properties' why crepe paper is unique?

options.A: Paper contains crimped crinkle lines that can expand up to 150-200% when pulled, creating natural petal bulges
options.B: Crepe paper dissolves in glue instantly
options.C: It is completely tear-proof steel card

questions.explanation: Crepe paper mechanical stretch capabilities enable three-dimensional modeling of organic petal and cup shapes.

questions.question: Paper craft tools 'Corner Rounder Punch' why used on bookmark/photo corners?

options.A: Cuts off sharp paper corners to clean rounded curves, preventing dog-eared corners damage

questions.explanation: Rounding edges prevents corner tips bending and fraying under regular hand usage.

questions.question: Gift wraps styles 'Pleated wrapping' why horizontal pleats are created on front faces?

options.A: Adds architectural luxury folding textures to box wraps, creating pockets to slide cards/flowers

questions.explanation: Pleated wraps create dimensional visual interest, complementing luxury gifting aesthetics.

questions.question: Paper craft business marketing 'E-Commerce cataloging product size declarations' why dimension specs are key details?

options.A: Ensures buyers understand actual product sizes (prevents return disputes of too small/too big craft items)

questions.explanation: Accurate height-width-depth descriptions in online craft catalogs align buyer expectations, minimizing disputes.

questions.question: Paper quilling shapes configurations 'Eye / Marquise shape' how it is formed from teardrop?

options.A: Squeeze both opposite ends of loose circular coil between fingers to form two sharp points
options.B: Roll paper strip on flat needle

questions.explanation: Squeezing opposite points creates eye/marquise contours, typical of leaves and abstract filler motifs.

questions.question: Paper sculpting tools 'Creasing tool / Scoring needle' why used before folding thick cardboard sheet?

options.A: Compresses fiber lines along fold path to prevent paper cracking/breaking along outer fold line
options.B: Cuts board to two pieces directly

questions.explanation: Scoring creates neat fiber compression grooves, ensuring thick cardboards fold smoothly without jagged edge breaks.

questions.question: Gift packaging configurations 'Shredded paper fill' why placed inside gift hampers boxes?

options.A: Cushions items, prevents movement damage and provides festive voluminous box filling decorations

questions.explanation: Shredded paper absorbs shocks, packing items tightly to prevent shifting during transit.

questions.question: Paper cutting alignments metal ruler why preferred over plastic rulers for craft knife cuts?

options.A: Knife blade cannot cut/shave metal edges (protects straight edge line and fingers from slip cuts)

questions.explanation: Plastic rulers get chipped by craft blades, ruining straight guide lines. Rigid steel rulers ensure straight, safe cuts.

questions.question: Greeting card designs structures 'Gate fold card' how card opens?

options.A: Two side flaps fold inward meeting at center, opening like double doors to expose interior message

questions.explanation: Gate fold card structures mimic double entry doors, popular for premium wedding invitations.

questions.question: Paper quilling shapes configurations Eye?

options.A: Squeeze both opposite ends of loose circular coil between fingers to form two sharp points
options.B: Roll paper strip on flat needle

questions.explanation: Squeezing opposite points creates eye/marquise contours, typical of leaves and abstract filler motifs.

options.A: Compresses fiber lines along fold path to prevent paper cracking/breaking along outer fold line
options.B: Cuts board to two pieces directly

questions.explanation: Scoring creates neat fiber compression grooves, ensuring thick cardboards fold smoothly without jagged edge breaks.

options.A: Cushions items, prevents movement damage and provides festive voluminous box filling decorations

questions.explanation: Shredded paper absorbs shocks, packing items tightly to prevent shifting during transit.

options.A: Knife blade cannot cut/shave metal edges (protects straight edge line and fingers from slip cuts)

questions.explanation: Plastic rulers get chipped by craft blades, ruining straight guide lines. Rigid steel rulers ensure straight, safe cuts.

questions.question: Greeting card designs structures Gate?

options.A: Two side flaps fold inward meeting at center, opening like double doors to expose interior message

questions.explanation: Gate fold card structures mimic double entry doors, popular for premium wedding invitations.

questions.question: Paper flower designs 'Internal stamen creations' what is standard technique using yellow thread/paper fringes?

options.A: Fringing paper strips edge, rolling tight, fluffing out tips and gluing to flower centers
options.B: Pouring yellow paint directly on petals

questions.explanation: Fringed paper centers mimic pollen stamens, creating realistic depth highlights inside card paper flower bouquets.

questions.question: Origami folding adjustments 'Symmetrical alignment check' why folding corners exactly to margins is key rule?

options.A: Even slight misalignments accumulate, causing final complex folds (eg crane wings) to twist asymmetrical collapse
options.B: Symmetric folds save paper material sizes

questions.explanation: Origami math parameters require precise crease geometries, avoiding asymmetry errors in final shapes.

questions.question: Gift bows styling 'Pom-pom bow' how it is constructed from satin ribbon loops?

options.A: Wrap ribbon around hand 10-12 times, notch center edges, tie center tight, pull loops out starting from inner side
options.B: Cut ribbon to vertical strips and glue flat
options.C: Dip ribbon loops in starch water

questions.explanation: Center notches allow loops to stand out spherically, forming classic fluffy pom-pom bows.

questions.question: Paper craft tools 'Rotary circle cutter' why utilized?

options.A: Cuts perfect circular paper shapes of different diameters without jagged blade notches

questions.explanation: Rotary compass cutters turn pivot points cleanly, delivering smooth circle contours.

questions.question: Greeting card decoration 'Distress ink edging' why color shading is applied on card margins?

options.A: Adds vintage, aged, and rustic dimensional borders visual borders to flat white cards

questions.explanation: Buffing dye inks on margins creates warm shaded borders, poping central image layers.

questions.question: Paper flower designs stamen?

options.A: Fringing paper strips edge, rolling tight, fluffing out tips and gluing to flower centers
options.B: Pouring yellow paint directly on petals

questions.explanation: Fringed paper centers mimic pollen stamens, creating realistic depth highlights inside card paper flower bouquets.

options.B: Symmetric folds save paper material sizes

questions.question: Paper Crafting glues 'Glue Stick' (sukhi gond stick) why preferred for lightweight paper collages?

options.A: Low moisture formula prevents paper wrinkling/buckling (liquid glues warp thin sheets)
options.B: Glue stick is highly permanent under high heat

questions.explanation: Dry wax-like glues stick papers flat without saturating fibers, avoiding unsightly sheet distortions.

questions.question: Origami fold bases 'Waterbomb Base' (jal-bumb aadhar fold) what shape it initiates?

options.A: Triangular base with four flaps pointing downwards (formed by pushing side margins inward)

questions.explanation: Waterbomb base centers V folds diagonal and vertical crease lines, initiating folded box/balloon structures.

questions.question: Quilling shapes configurations 'Arrowhead shape' how it is formed from teardrop?

options.A: Push round bottom of teardrop inwards to create concave V-indent while keeping tip sharp

questions.explanation: Indenting round base forms triangular arrowhead arrows, popular in geometric quilling layouts.

questions.question: Paper sculpting tools 'Fringe scissors' (multi blade scissors) why utilized in flower centers?

options.A: Cuts 5 parallel thin slices simultaneously, speeding up stamen fringes prep work

questions.explanation: Multi blades cuts uniform parallel slits in single snip, speeding up production of fringed paper flowers.

questions.question: Gift packaging configurations 'Crinkle cut fill' vs 'Wood excelsior fill' which is safer for glass bottles packing?

options.A: Wood excelsior (fibrous woody locks catch drops vibration shocks better than paper shreds)

questions.explanation: Wood excelsior (shavings) interlocks tightly, forming dense spring cushions that protect heavy glassware during transport.

questions.question: Paper Crafting glues 'Glue Dots' (adhesive tape dots) why popular in instant card layering?

options.A: Double-sided dry pressure glue spots that bond instantly without any dry time or wet paper warping
options.B: Glue dots turn transparent under UV light

questions.explanation: Glue dots are pre-formed dry pressure adhesives, ideal for attaching ribbons and small decorations instantly.

questions.question: Gift wrapping designs 'Japanese diagonal wrap' why unique?

options.A: Wraps rectangular box diagonally using single piece paper, requiring only one piece of tape at final flap

questions.explanation: Diagonal wrap rolls boxes in angled orientations, folding flaps under tension to secure gifts with minimal tape.

questions.question: Paper craft products shipping configurations why rigid cardboard mailer envelopes are used for flat greeting cards?

options.A: Prevents envelope bending and corner crumpling during postal sorting conveyor runs

questions.explanation: Stiff cardboard envelopes resist bending forces, delivering pristine handmade greeting cards to buyers.

questions.question: Paper craft tools 'Decorative edge scissors' why utilized in paper tags crafts?

options.A: Cuts pattern borders (eg pinking, waves, deckle edges) to create instant decorative tag margins

questions.explanation: Specialized blade profiles cut repeating scallops or wavy edges, adding visual design layouts to gift tags.

questions.question: Paper cutting alignments metal?

options.A: Knife blade cannot cut/shave metal edges (protects straight edge line and fingers from slip cuts)

questions.explanation: Plastic rulers get chipped by craft blades, ruining straight guide lines. Rigid steel rulers ensure straight, safe cuts.

questions.question: Paper Craft & Gift Wrapping final visual check why crease compression is key final step?

options.A: Refines box fold edges and ribbon angles, providing crisp professional luxury shapes

questions.explanation: Final bone folder sweeps compress bulky paper intersections, validating clean symmetrical geometry and luxury finishes.

options.A: Double-Sided Tape / Double-stick tape (dono taraf chipkane wala tape)
options.D: Paper gum liquid directly on edges

questions.explanation: Double sided tape flaps ke under hide ho jata hai, jisse gift wrapping exterior seams paper clear visual clean interfaces show hotay hain.

questions.question: Paper flower making curls edge?

options.A: Running edge of scissors blade along petal (scissors blade sweep tension)
options.B: Soaking paper in hot water loops

questions.explanation: Scissors blade and thumb compression drag paper structure bend curl direction control details checks.

questions.question: Gift box corners mitred corners?

options.A: Creates highly professional, clean flat triangular folds without bulky paper stacking wrinkles

questions.explanation: Mitred folding technique angles overlapping flaps cleanly, producing crisp geometric outlines on rectangular gift box corners.
